nl_query: Show all scripts where the scan was performed by a scanner device registered at a campus different from the campus where the exam was scheduled, indicating a potential logistics or data entry error.
failed_sql:
SELECT s.id, s.urn, s.exam_id, s.course_id, s.student_id, s.s3_key, s.dek_id, s.scan_metadata->>'quality_score' AS quality_score, sd.device_name, au.code AS campus_code, au.name AS campus_name, esc.exam_date, esc.campus_id
FROM   answer_script s
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = s.id AND sa.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_id = sa.evaluator_id
JOIN   exam_schedule_cache es ON es.exam_id = s.exam_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = es.campus_id
JOIN   academic_unit_closure esc ON esc.descendant_id = au.id
JOIN   scanner_device sd ON sd.id = s.dek_id
WHERE  sd.campus_id <> es.campus_id
  AND  s.scan_status = 'SCANNED'
  AND  s.evaluation_status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED'
ORDER  BY s.exam_date DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'campus_id'. It exists in multiple tables (scanner_device, exam_schedule_cache). You must qualify it with a table alias.
